queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(facility_zone, 'UNKNOWN_ZONE') AS safe_zone, CONCAT(sorter_model, ' @ ', control_center) AS sorter_op_label FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12
SELECT _timestamp, re_match(log, 'warehouse|event') AS matched, split_part(log, ' ', 1) AS first_word FROM "{stream}" WHERE log IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, UPPER(pallet_id) AS pallet_upper, LOWER(conveyor_lane) AS lane_lower, CONCAT(sorter_model, '-', operation_mode) AS sorter_op, TRIM(COALESCE(build_signature, '')) AS clean_build, LENGTH(CONCAT(facility_zone, '-', control_center)) AS label_len FROM "{stream}" WHERE pallet_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, re_match(pallet_id, 'PL-00[1-4]') AS is_front_pallet, split_part(pallet_id, '-', 1) AS prefix, split_part(pallet_id, '-', 2) AS suffix_num FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(pallet_id, 'PL-00[1-8]') = TRUE ORDER BY suffix_num ASC

SELECT control_center, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT sorter_model, ' | ' ORDER BY sorter_model ASC) AS sorter_models, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT operation_mode, ', ') AS op_modes, COUNT(*) AS event_cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE control_center IS NOT NULL GROUP BY control_center HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY event_cnt DESC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, build_signature, SUBSTR(build_signature, 1, 8) AS build_prefix, SUBSTR(build_signature, 10, 2) AS build_suffix, REPLACE(build_signature, 'BS-', 'BUILD_') AS replaced_sig FROM "{stream}" WHERE build_signature LIKE 'BS-2026-%' ORDER BY build_signature ASC, _timestamp ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, LOWER(CONCAT(SUBSTR(conveyor_lane, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(facility_zone, 5, 1))) AS short_code, CASE WHEN re_match(CONCAT(conveyor_lane, '-', facility_zone), 'LANE-[AB]-ZONE-[12]') THEN 'core' ELSE 'edge' END AS location_type FROM "{stream}" WHERE conveyor_lane IS NOT NULL AND facility_zone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY location_type ASC, short_code ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, COALESCE(sorter_model, 'UNKNOWN_SORTER') AS safe_sorter, NULLIF(sorter_model, 'SORT-Q5') AS exclude_q5, COALESCE(NULLIF(sorter_model, 'SORT-Q5'), 'FILTERED') AS filtered_sorter FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, log, pallet_id, re_match(log, 'warehouse|event') AS has_keyword, re_match(log, '[0-9]+') AS has_digit, LENGTH(log) AS msg_length, POSITION('record' IN log) AS record_pos FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(log, 'warehouse') = TRUE ORDER BY msg_length DESC LIMIT 12

results: Q121 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q121-0
Q121 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q121-3
Q122 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q122-0
Q122 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q122-3
Q123 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q123-0

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT CONCAT(operation_mode, ':', CAST(ROUND(throughput_rate, 0) AS VARCHAR)), '; ' ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS mode_tput_list, COUNT(DISTINCT operation_mode) AS distinct_modes FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY distinct_modes DESC

expected.note: STRING_AGG with CONCAT of mode + rounded throughput, ORDER BY inside STRING_AGG — zero rows, columns unverifiable

queries.sql: SELECT rtrim(ltrim(spath(array_element(cast_to_arr(db_info), 1), 'cid'), '["'), '"]') as cid, count(_timestamp) as count_s FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(api_name, 'sams') GROUP BY cid

expected.note: String trimming with rtrim/ltrim, spath, array_element, cast_to_arr — OO-specific, skip_sqllogictest

queries.sql: SELECT source_ip, visitor_session_id, cookie_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE source_ip IS NOT NULL   AND TRIM(CAST(source_ip AS VARCHAR)) <> ''   AND visitor_session_id IS NOT NULL   AND TRIM(CAST(visitor_session_id AS VARCHAR)) <> ''   AND LENGTH(CAST(visitor_session_id AS VARCHAR)) >= 8   AND cookie_id IS NOT NULL   AND TRIM(CAST(cookie_id AS VARCHAR)) <> ''   AND LENGTH(CAST(cookie_id AS VARCHAR)) >= 8   AND graphql_operation = 'verifyPayment' GROUP BY source_ip, visitor_session_id, cookie_id ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT
  UPPER(TRIM(facility_zone)) AS clean_zone,
  LOWER(operation_mode) AS lower_mode,
  CONCAT(UPPER(SUBSTR(sorter_model, 1, 4)), '-', facility_zone) AS model_zone,
  LENGTH(log) AS log_length,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE log LIKE '%warehouse%'
  AND LENGTH(log) > 20
GROUP BY
  UPPER(TRIM(facility_zone)),
  LOWER(operation_mode),
  CONCAT(UPPER(SUBSTR(sorter_model, 1, 4)), '-', facility_zone),
  LENGTH(log)
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT api_name,
  UPPER(SUBSTR(api_name, 1, 6)) AS api_prefix,
  str_match_ignore_case(log, 'error') AS has_error,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE LENGTH(api_name) > 3
  AND latency_ms > 0
GROUP BY api_name, UPPER(SUBSTR(api_name, 1, 6)), str_match_ignore_case(log, 'error')
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  CONCAT(region_code, '-', facility_zone, '-', UPPER(SUBSTR(operation_mode, 1, 3))) AS location_tag,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN str_match_ignore_case(log, 'ACK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ack_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN str_match_ignore_case(log, 'error') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count,
  AVG(item_count) AS avg_items
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE LENGTH(region_code) > 2
GROUP BY CONCAT(region_code, '-', facility_zone, '-', UPPER(SUBSTR(operation_mode, 1, 3)))
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT concat(action_category, '-', action_subcategory, ' :: ', coalesce(exception_message, 'ok')) AS event_summary, _timestamp, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'

results: performanceMetric-vitalsInp :: OverflowException: throughput_rate 999.0 exceeds max capacity
performanceMetric-clickEvent :: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms
performanceMetric-vitalsInp :: ResourceExhaustedException: sorter_model SORT-M3 queue full

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, coalesce(exception_message, upstream_error_code, error_code, 'no_error') AS display_error, coalesce(page_url, resource_path, endpoint_path) AS source FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric'

results: SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA
NetworkException: connection to batch sync failed

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, UPPER(error_code) AS err, LOWER(exception_message) AS msg, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND LOWER(exception_message) LIKE '%exception%'

results: networkexception: connection to batch sync failed
networkexception: connection to batch sync failed

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 30 THEN substring(exception_message, 1, 30) || '...' ELSE exception_message END) AS truncated_error, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message IS NOT NULL
SELECT concat(page_slug, '/', action_category) AS path, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE concat(page_slug, '/', action_category) LIKE '%itemPage%' GROUP BY path ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT _timestamp, action_category, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE LOWER(TRIM(error_code)) IN ('e001', 'e003', 'e005') AND action_category = 'performanceMetric'

SELECT _timestamp, REPLACE(component_name, '-engine', '') AS comp_short, REPLACE(exception_message, 'Exception', 'ERR') AS short_msg FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND component_name LIKE '%engine%'

SELECT (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 40 THEN 'long_msg' WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 10 THEN 'medium_msg' WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 0 THEN 'short_msg' ELSE 'no_msg' END) AS msg_length_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY msg_length_class

SELECT page_slug, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT error_code, ' | ' ORDER BY error_code ASC) AS error_list FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug

SELECT _timestamp, concat(coalesce(page_url, page_slug), ' | ', coalesce(exception_message, 'ok')) AS display_text, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' LIMIT 20

results: itemPage | OverflowException: throughput_rate 999.0 exceeds max capacity
itemPage | OverflowException: throughput_rate 999.0 exceeds max capacity

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, concat(UPPER(action_category), ':', LOWER(error_code)) AS type_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL

results: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms

queries.sql: SELECT concat(substring(exception_message, 1, 25), '... [', error_code, ']') AS summary, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND char_length(exception_message) > 10
SELECT _timestamp, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND LOWER(exception_message) LIKE '%exception%' AND LOWER(component_name) LIKE '%engine%'

SELECT _timestamp, concat(page_slug, ' -> ', action_category, ' -> ', action_subcategory) AS full_path, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'navigation' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, concat(coalesce(page_url, resource_path, endpoint_path, page_slug), '?', coalesce(http_method, 'GET')) AS full_url, visitor_session_id, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation') LIMIT 20

SELECT _timestamp, concat(COALESCE(page_slug, 'unknown'), '|', COALESCE(action_category, 'unknown'), '|', COALESCE(action_subcategory, 'unknown')) AS full_path, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, UPPER(component_name) AS comp_upper, LOWER(exception_message) AS exc_lower, LENGTH(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) AS exc_len FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND component_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY exc_len DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

results: securityexception: unauthorized access to control_center cc-alpha
networkexception: connection to batch sync failed

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, SUBSTRING(COALESCE(client_agent, ''), 1, 30) AS agent_short, SUBSTRING(COALESCE(exception_message, ''), 1, 40) AS exc_short FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

results: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not re

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, TRIM(COALESCE(page_slug, '')) AS clean_page, TRIM(COALESCE(error_code, '')) AS clean_error, REPLACE(COALESCE(component_name, ''), '-', '_') AS comp_name_normalized FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, CONCAT(COALESCE(os_platform, 'Unknown'), ' / ', COALESCE(device_type, 'Unknown')) AS platform_device, action_category, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, array_extract(regexp_match(exception_message, '([A-Za-z]+Exception)'), 1) AS exc_type, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message IS NOT NULL AND re_match(exception_message, 'Exception') ORDER BY exc_type ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN LENGTH(COALESCE(page_url, '')) > 20 THEN SUBSTRING(page_url, 1, 20) || '...' ELSE COALESCE(page_url, page_slug) END) AS short_url, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IN ('navigation', 'interaction') ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, concat(COALESCE(org_name, 'unknown-org'), '/', COALESCE(site_name, 'unknown-site'), '/', COALESCE(region_code, 'unknown-region')) AS location_hierarchy, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(resource_path, ''), '/logs/', ''), '/data/', '') AS clean_resource, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND resource_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY clean_resource ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN re_match(os_platform, 'Android') THEN 'Android' WHEN re_match(os_platform, 'iPhone|iOS|Mac OS X') THEN 'iOS' WHEN re_match(os_platform, 'Windows') THEN 'Windows' ELSE COALESCE(os_platform, 'Other') END) AS platform_group, page_slug, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND latency_ms > 0 ORDER BY platform_group ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15
SELECT spath(request_payload, 'message.endpoint') AS endpoint, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(request_payload, 'endpoint') GROUP BY endpoint ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

expected.note: spath() is OO-specific; DuckDB cannot replicate

queries.sql: SELECT spath(request_payload, 'message.status') AS msg_status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(request_payload, 'status') GROUP BY msg_status ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

expected.note: spath() is OO-specific; DuckDB cannot replicate

queries.sql: SELECT split_part(exception_message, chr(32), 1) AS first_word, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY first_word ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag, passthrough_flag, CAST(auth_result AS VARCHAR)) AS fallback_tag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY fallback_tag ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT CONCAT(component_name, '/', COALESCE(route_key, 'no-route'), ' (', scan_category, ')') AS full_route, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY full_route ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT CASE WHEN length(CONCAT(COALESCE(exception_message, ''), COALESCE(log_message, ''))) < 50 THEN 'short' WHEN length(CONCAT(COALESCE(exception_message, ''), COALESCE(log_message, ''))) < 100 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'long' END AS msg_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY msg_class ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT CAST(tag_a AS VARCHAR) || '-' || CAST(tag_b AS VARCHAR) AS combined_tag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY combined_tag ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT UPPER(COALESCE(org_name, site_name, region_code, 'UNKNOWN')) AS location, LOWER(scan_category) AS scan_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY location, scan_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(page_url, endpoint_path, '/'), 'https://', ''), 'http://', '') AS clean_path, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE page_url IS NOT NULL OR endpoint_path IS NOT NULL GROUP BY clean_path ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT TRIM(COALESCE(build_signature, build_version)) AS build_id, SUBSTRING(COALESCE(build_signature, build_version), 1, 4) AS prefix, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY build_id, prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(pallet_id, 'PL-00[1-4]') ORDER BY _timestamp
SELECT _timestamp, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(error_code, 'E00\d') ORDER BY _timestamp
SELECT _timestamp, log FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(log, '^Q[0-9]+ warehouse') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(sorter_model, 'SORT-[AX]') ORDER BY _timestamp
SELECT _timestamp, build_signature FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(build_signature, 'BS-202[56]') ORDER BY _timestamp
SELECT _timestamp, CAST(throughput_rate AS VARCHAR) AS tput_str FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(CAST(throughput_rate AS VARCHAR), '^[1-9]') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, CAST(latency_ms AS VARCHAR) AS lat_str FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(CAST(latency_ms AS VARCHAR), '^[0-9]+$') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, re_match(os_platform, 'Android|iOS') AS is_mobile, os_platform FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, re_match(api_name, '^(Get|Update|Search)') AS is_crud, api_name FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(upstream_error_code, 'NONE') AS ue_code, CASE WHEN re_match(COALESCE(upstream_error_code, 'NONE'), 'UP-E00[1-5]') THEN 'critical' ELSE 'minor' END AS severity FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(endpoint_path, '/unknown') AS ep, CASE WHEN re_match(COALESCE(endpoint_path, ''), '/api/v[12]/') THEN 'v1v2' WHEN re_match(COALESCE(endpoint_path, ''), '/api/v[34]/') THEN 'v3v4' ELSE 'other' END AS api_version FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15
SELECT _timestamp, log, component_name FROM "{stream}" WHERE NOT re_match(component_name, '^(sorter|conveyor)') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

results: Q582 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q582-0
Q583 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q583-3
Q584 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q584-0

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, exception_message, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE NOT re_match(error_code, '^E00[1-5]') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, user_agent_str FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(user_agent_str, 'Mozilla|Chrome|Firefox|curl') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, attack_name FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(attack_name, '^(SQL|XSS|CSRF)') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, geo_country, geo_org FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(geo_country, '^(US|UK|DE|JP)$') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(org_name, 'warehouse-(east|west)')
SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(facility_zone, 'ZONE-[1-3]') GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone
SELECT _timestamp, CONCAT(pallet_id, '-', facility_zone) AS location_key FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(CONCAT(pallet_id, '-', facility_zone), 'PL-00[1-4]-ZONE-[12]') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
